24/7 Crisis Support: Call or text 980.771.HOPE (4673)  ·  Parent Support  ·  Domestic Violence  ·  Sexual Assault  ·  Free & Confidential Call Now

Every month, LINK Lake Norman celebrates its most dedicated community builders. Here's how we recognize and reward our top volunteers across all categories.

Profile Badge System
Earn badges on your volunteer profile as you hit milestones. Badges display publicly on the leaderboard and your profile page — visible to nonprofits, employers, and schools who use LINK.

Seasons of Giving Lake Norman
Senior care & companionship programs in Huntersville, NC
Visit Website →
🚗 Wednesday Meal Delivery
Every Wednesday · 4:45 PM – 5:30 PM
Pick up: Huntersville United Methodist Church
Deliver to: 300 Huntersville Concord Rd, Huntersville NC
Contact: Jaime Lane · info@seasonsofgivinglkn.org
By registering you agree to pick up meals at Huntersville UMC at 4:45 PM, deliver to assigned recipients by 5:30 PM, and notify Jaime Lane if you need to cancel. Instructions will be emailed upon acceptance.
🎨 Thursday Activities
Every Thursday · Time varies by activity
Location: Seasons of Giving LKN, Huntersville NC
Contact: Jaime Lane · info@seasonsofgivinglkn.org
🏛️ Tuesday Community Resources
Every Tuesday · 1:00 PM
For: senior services, benefits advocates, community organizations
Contact: Jaime Lane · info@seasonsofgivinglkn.org
🌎 NOT YOUR AVERAGE MEETING

LINK Lake Norman Quarterly
Nonprofit Connection

Collaboration · Impact · Shared Resources

📅 Thursday, April 23, 2026 ⏰ 9:00 AM – 10:30 AM 📍 The Serve Pickleball + Kitchen, Cornelius NC 🗺️ 20220 Chartown Dr, Cornelius 28031

Join us in person for the LINK Lake Norman Quarterly Nonprofit Connection! Meet other local nonprofit leaders face-to-face, share ideas, build meaningful partnerships, and make a positive impact in our community. Come ready to connect, collaborate, and multiply your mission.

🤝 True collaboration — not just networking
💡 Resource sharing, roundtables & cross-org partnerships
🏫 Open to nonprofits, schools, civic orgs & community leaders
⏱️ 1.5 hours · In person · Cornelius NC
🎟️ Register on Eventbrite 📋 View Full Event Details ✉️ Membership Info

Quarterly event · The Serve Pickleball + Kitchen · Cornelius NC · Join the LINK Lake Norman network for future event announcements.

📋 Register for the Next Quarterly Roundtable

Open to all nonprofits, community partners, businesses, and LINK members. Held every quarter in North Mecklenburg.

About the Quarterly Connection™

The LINK Lake Norman Nonprofit & Community Quarterly Connection is the region's premier gathering for organizations making a difference in North Mecklenburg and South Iredell. Unlike typical networking events, this is a working session — built around real collaboration, shared challenges, and collective impact.

🤝 Who Should Attend
Nonprofit leaders, executive directors, board members, civic organization heads, school administrators, government liaisons, and community advocates.
💡 What Happens
Facilitated roundtables, resource-sharing segments, cross-org partnership introductions, community data updates, and open collaboration time.
🎯 The Goal
Leave with at least one new partnership, one shared resource connection, and a clearer picture of the community landscape across North Mecklenburg.
📬 Stay Connected
Email [email protected] to RSVP, request membership info, or get on the quarterly invite list.

🔐

Member-Only Nonprofit Concierge Resources

Your $200 annual membership unlocks the full LINK Lake Norman resource library — everything you need to start, grow, fund, and sustain your nonprofit in North Carolina. Curated, current, and always updated.

🔒 Active members: log in via My Portal to access all resources

How to Start a Nonprofit in NC

Step-by-step guide: articles of incorporation, 501(c)(3) application, bylaws, board formation, EIN, state registration, and charitable solicitation license — in the right order.

IRS 501(c)(3) Application (Form 1023) NC Secretary of State — Business Registration NC Attorney General — Charitable Registration IRS Form SS-4 (EIN Application)

Compliance & Annual Requirements

Stay legal and in good standing: IRS Form 990, NC annual report, charitable solicitation renewal, board meeting minutes, conflict of interest policies, and audit requirements.

IRS Form 990 Guide NC Annual Report Filing Nonprofit Financial Policies Template BoardSource — Board Meeting Templates

Fundraising & Grant Writing

How to get donations, write winning grants, cultivate major donors, plan fundraising events, and stay compliant with NC charitable solicitation laws.

Candid / Foundation Directory — Grant Search NC Fundraising Compliance Guidelines Grants.gov — Federal Grant Opportunities Foundation for the Carolinas — Local Grants

Event Sponsorships & In-Kind

How to attract event sponsors, create sponsor packages, approach local businesses, manage in-kind donations, and run auctions and raffles legally in NC.

NC Raffle & Lottery Guidelines for Nonprofits IRS In-Kind Donation Acknowledgment Rules NC Council of Nonprofits — Best Practices

Board Governance & Templates

Meeting minute templates, board policies, conflict of interest forms, officer role descriptions, term limits, quorum rules, and Robert's Rules basics — all NC-specific.

NC Center for Nonprofits — Member Resources Board Roles & Responsibility Guide IRS Compliance Guide for 501(c)(3) Public Charities

Top Nonprofit Resources

The best free tools for nonprofits: project management, donor CRM, volunteer tracking, website builders, email marketing, and accounting — many free for nonprofits.

TechSoup — Free software for nonprofits Canva for Nonprofits — Free design tools VolunteerHub — Volunteer management Candid/GuideStar — Nonprofit profiles & data

How to Dissolve a Nonprofit

If it's time to close: NC dissolution process, IRS final return, notifying the Attorney General, distributing assets, and handling outstanding obligations properly.

NC Articles of Dissolution IRS — Terminating Tax-Exempt Status

Local & County Resources

Mecklenburg County and Iredell County resources, community foundations, government contacts, and local nonprofit support organizations.

Mecklenburg County Community Support Services Iredell County Government Resources Foundation for the Carolinas — NP Support American Job Centers — Workforce Resources
🚀

Member Nonprofits Only

In-kind donations, auction items, sponsor opportunities, and fundraiser contributions are exclusively available to LINK Lake Norman member nonprofits. Log in to your portal to claim items and connect with donors.

Membership is $200/year · Includes full platform access · Connect with volunteers, donors & businesses
🎁 In-Kind Donations, Sponsors & Auction Items
Available items, sponsor opportunities, and fundraiser contributions for LKN member nonprofits
🏅
LINK LKN Community Partner Program
Every business that donates an item automatically earns Community Partner status — recognized across the entire LINK network.
🏷️ Digital Community Partner Sticker
Automatically sent to every donor business to display on their website, social media, and print materials — "LINK LKN Community Partner."
📣 Giveback Event Recognition
All Community Partners are announced at LINK giveback events, featured in the monthly newsletter, and recognized on the hub directory.
✅ One Commitment. Done.
Post once — your donation reaches every member nonprofit. No cold calls, no repeated asks, no wasted effort. Your year's giving commitment is fulfilled in minutes.
📋 Sharable Language for Businesses
"All our annual donations, auction items & sponsorships are listed on the LINK LKN Community Hub at linklakenorman.com — one platform, all Lake Norman nonprofits."
📌 Claim Rules & Stipulations
🔒 Member nonprofits only — Must be an active LINK LKN member ($200/yr) to claim any item
1️⃣ One claim per business per year — Each NP may claim one item per donor business annually, ensuring fair access for all members
📬 Direct connection — After claiming, LINK introduces you and the donor directly. All coordination is between your org and the donor
🧾 Tax receipt from donor — The donating business issues all tax-deductible receipts directly — not LINK — ensuring proper 501(c)(3) compliance
⏰ Respond within 5 days — Once connected with a donor, nonprofits must respond within 5 business days or the item returns to the board
🚫 No resale — Donated items must be used for your nonprofit's mission or events — not resold or transferred to third parties
✅ Good standing required — Membership must be current and paid. Nonprofits with outstanding issues or lapsed memberships are not eligible to claim
🎯 Mission match — The claimed item must align with your nonprofit's stated mission and intended programs. LINK reserves the right to reassign items that don't fit

Available In-Kind Donations

Items and services donated by businesses and community members. Available exclusively to LINK Lake Norman member nonprofits. Log in to your portal to claim directly.

Available Now

Office Furniture — 6 Desks, 12 Chairs

Gently used office furniture donated by a Huntersville business. Great for new or growing nonprofits.

Available Now

Commercial Kitchen Time — 8 hrs/month

Local restaurant offering kitchen access for food nonprofits needing prep space in Cornelius.

Available Now

Marketing Photography — 4-hour session

Professional photographer donating a session for nonprofit event or program documentation.

Available Now

Storage Space — 10x10 climate-controlled unit

Donated by Morningstar Storage for a member nonprofit needing supply or equipment storage.

Auction & Raffle Items Available

Items available for nonprofit fundraising events — auctions, raffles, and benefit dinners. All items donated by LKN businesses and community partners.

Gift certificate to a local lakefront restaurant. Perfect for gala or benefit dinner auction.

Business Partnership Inquiry

Tell us about your goals and we'll build the right partnership for your business.

Your logo will appear on the Community Hub, leaderboard, and partner materials.
Company overview, services brochure, or one-pager for our partner directory.

🎁 Donate an Item, Service or Sponsorship

Businesses can donate in-kind goods, services, auction items, or raffle prizes directly through LINK Lake Norman. Set your inventory, limits, and item type — we'll connect you directly with the right nonprofit. Note: tax-deductible donation receipts are issued directly by the nonprofit you support — not LINK. This ensures your donation is properly acknowledged by the 501(c)(3) that received it.

💼 Why Businesses Partner Through LINK Lake Norman
You're not just donating — you're building your brand, saving time, earning tax benefits, and becoming a recognized community leader. Here's exactly what you get.
⏱️
Time Saved
Instead of calling 26+ nonprofits one at a time, you submit one form here and we match your donation to the right organizations instantly. What used to take days of outreach takes minutes.
💰
Tax Benefits
In-kind donations of goods and services are tax-deductible at fair market value. The nonprofit you support will issue you a proper receipt directly — ready for your accountant. Keep more of what you earn while giving back.
📣
Brand Visibility
Your business logo appears on the LINK community hub, the in-kind board, event materials, and the leaderboard. Every volunteer and nonprofit in the network sees your brand — hundreds of community-minded locals monthly.
🤝
Community Partner Status
LINK Community Partners are recognized at our quarterly roundtables, featured in the monthly newsletter, and highlighted across social media. You're not a donor — you're a named community leader people trust and remember.
📦
Inventory Control
You set the quantity, item limits per nonprofit, and expiry date. Donate what you can afford, when it works for you. No pressure, no cold calls — just a simple form that puts you in control of your giving.
🎯
Real Impact You Can See
You'll know exactly which nonprofit used your donation, for what purpose, and when. No wondering if your gift made a difference — you'll have direct confirmation from the organization that received it.
📋 How It Works in 3 Steps
1
Submit your item
Fill out the form below with your donation type, value, and quantity. Takes under 2 minutes.
2
LINK matches & connects
We post your item on the in-kind board and connect you directly with interested nonprofits via email.
3
Nonprofit sends receipt
The nonprofit that receives your donation issues your tax-deductible receipt directly — compliant, clean, and ready for filing.
+ Add a Donation Item or Sponsorship
💰 Sponsorship Details
Shows on the in-kind board next to your donation listing.
When you submit, LINK Lake Norman will review your items, list them on the In-Kind & Sponsors board, and automatically send a professional introduction email connecting you with interested nonprofits. You control inventory and limits.
🤝

Help Us Keep Building a Connected Community

LINK Lake Norman is the connective tissue between nonprofits, businesses, volunteers, and community across North Mecklenburg and South Iredell. We do the leg work — building portals, matching volunteers, curating resources, and connecting people to purpose — so nonprofits can focus on their mission.

🌐

Become a Nonprofit Member

$200/year gives your org a full concierge platform. The best investment in your community impact.

💼

Become a Business Sponsor

Sponsorships from $500/year. Get visibility, impact, and a seat at the table in North Mecklenburg.

❤️

Donate to the Community Fund

Contribute to the shared pool — divided equally among all member nonprofits at year-end.

📣

Spread the Word

Share LINK Lake Norman with nonprofits, volunteers, and businesses in your network. Every connection matters.

Google Sheets Webhook

GitHub Deployment

1. Create repo at github.com → name: link-lkn-hub
2. Upload link-lkn-hub.html → rename to index.html
3. Settings → Pages → Source: main branch / root
4. Live at: https://yourusername.github.io/link-lkn-hub
5. To add more logos: upload to /logos/ folder → update logo: field in NPS array
🏫

Group Portals — Schools, Teams & Clubs

Register your school, sports team, club, civic group, or organization as a group. Track collective service hours, manage group events, and see every member's individual contributions — all in one place.

NHS · Sports Teams · Clubs · Faith Groups · Civic Orgs · Any Group

Register Your Group

Create a group portal for your school, team, or organization. Each member still gets their own individual portal and leaderboard ranking — but you also get a group dashboard showing collective hours, events, and impact.

Members join your group by registering individually (Student or Adult portal) and entering your group password. All their hours roll up to your group dashboard automatically.

📊 Group Dashboard

See total hours, top members, active volunteers, and opportunities completed — all as a group. Perfect for NHS advisors, team coaches, and club leaders.

🏆 Group Leaderboard

Groups compete on a separate leaderboard by total hours. Schools, teams, and clubs can see how they rank against each other — driving friendly competition for community impact.

📋 Group Events

Post group-specific volunteer events visible only to your members, or open them to the wider community. Manage sign-ups and track attendance all in one place.

📄 Service Transcripts

Generate downloadable service hour transcripts for individual members — verified, dated, and signed by LINK LKN. Perfect for NHS, college applications, and scholarship submissions.

🏫

School & District Licenses Available

Replace spreadsheets and manual NHS tracking with a full service hour management platform. Annual licenses for schools and districts include unlimited student portals, advisor dashboards, automated transcripts, and reporting — everything a school needs to manage community service.

Contact Us for School Pricing
💰

LINK Lake Norman — Plans & Pricing

The core platform is always free for students and volunteers. We monetize the organizational and business side — keeping adoption high while building a sustainable concierge platform for LKN nonprofits.

Always Free

🎓

Student — Free Forever

$0

Individual volunteer portal, service hour tracking, points & badges, leaderboard ranking, nonprofit matching, and basic service transcript.

🙋

Adult Volunteer — Free Forever

$0

Individual portal, volunteer matching, community board access, hour logging, and leaderboard participation.

Paid Plans

⭐

Premium Student Profile

$19/year

Verified impact portfolio, official downloadable service transcript, featured visibility to colleges & employers, priority nonprofit matching, and digital badge for college apps.

Perfect for NHS, college applications, scholarship submissions
MOST POPULAR
🌐

Nonprofit Annual Membership

$200/year

Full portal with logo, mission, Volunteer & Donate buttons, volunteer matching, community board posting, event listings, member resource library, quarterly roundtables, in-kind coordination, and Google Sheets sync.

🏫

Group / School Portal

$99/year

Group dashboard, collective hour tracking, group leaderboard, group events, member management, automated service transcripts for all members, and advisor access.

Schools, NHS chapters, sports teams, clubs, civic groups
🏫

School / District License

$499+/year

Unlimited student portals school-wide, district-level reporting dashboard, admin controls for teachers & advisors, bulk service transcript generation, NHS hour verification, and custom branded group pages.

Replaces spreadsheets & manual NHS tracking for entire schools
Contact for Pricing

Business & Sponsor Plans

Community Friend
$500/yr

Logo on site · 1 nonprofit sponsorship · social recognition · volunteer board access

MOST POPULAR
Community Champion
$1,500/yr

Everything in Friend + employee volunteer program + featured spotlight + roundtable invites + impact report

Presenting Sponsor
$5,000/yr

"Presented by" branding sitewide · unlimited nonprofit access · custom culture strategy · VIP roundtable seat

Leaderboard Sponsor
$250/mo

Your brand on the volunteer leaderboard · badge sponsorships · monthly recognition posts · youth visibility

💡 The LINK LKN Revenue Strategy

Keep the core platform free for students to drive adoption. Monetize the organizational and business side — nonprofit memberships, school licenses, business sponsorships, premium profiles, and grant funding. The sweet spot: 30 nonprofits at $200 = $6,000 · 10 school licenses at $499 = $4,990 · 3 business sponsors at $1,500+ = $4,500+ · That's $15,000+ annually before events, grants, or premium student profiles.

You are registered!
Thank you '+first+'! Jaime Lane will email confirmation and delivery instructions to '+email+' within 24 hours.

Pick up: Huntersville UMC at 4:45 PM
Deliver to: 300 Huntersville Concord Rd by 5:30 PM
'; ['wed-first','wed-last','wed-email','wed-phone','wed-date','wed-emergency'].forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); if(agree)agree.checked=false; } function regThuActivity(){ var first=gv('thu-first'),last=gv('thu-last'),email=gv('thu-email'),activity=gv('thu-activity'); var res=document.getElementById('thu-result'); if(!first||!last||!email||!activity){res.innerHTML='
Please fill in all required fields including the activity.
';return;} sendSheet({formName:'SOG_ThuActivities',form_id:'SOG_ThuActivities',First:first,Last:last,Email:email,Phone:gv('thu-phone'),Activity:activity,Date:gv('thu-date'),Role:gv('thu-role'),Notes:gv('thu-notes'),Program:'Thursday Activities',Timestamp:new Date().toLocaleString()}); res.innerHTML='
You are signed up!
Thank you '+first+'! Your spot for '+activity+' is noted. Jaime will confirm details to '+email+'.

See you Thursday at Seasons of Giving LKN!
'; ['thu-first','thu-last','thu-email','thu-phone','thu-notes'].forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); } function regTueResource(){ var first=gv('tue-first'),last=gv('tue-last'),email=gv('tue-email'),org=gv('tue-org'),topic=gv('tue-topic'),type=gv('tue-type'); var res=document.getElementById('tue-result'); if(!first||!last||!email||!org||!topic||!type){res.innerHTML='
Please fill in all required fields.
';return;} sendSheet({formName:'SOG_TueResources',form_id:'SOG_TueResources',First:first,Last:last,Email:email,Phone:gv('tue-phone'),Organization:org,Website:gv('tue-web'),ResourceType:type,Date:gv('tue-date'),Topic:topic,Setup:gv('tue-setup'),Program:'Tuesday Community Resources',Timestamp:new Date().toLocaleString()}); res.innerHTML='
Request received!
Thank you '+first+' from '+org+'! Jaime will confirm your Tuesday 1 PM session date to '+email+'.

nonprofit: copy one entry, paste before the last ]; // and fill in: name, mission, web, vol, don, cat, logo // To REMOVE: delete the entire line starting with {name:"..." // Categories: "Food & Hunger" "Healthcare" "Youth & Education" // "Housing" "Senior Services" "Faith & Community" // "Arts & Culture" "Veterans" "Mental Health" "Workforce" // logo: leave "" for initials, or paste base64 data URI for image // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const NPS = [ {name:"Alongside Families",mission:"Connecting isolated families to local church communities - volunteer host homes and wraparound support to prevent unnecessary foster care. 100% family reunification.",web:"https://www.alongsidefamilies.org",vol:"https://www.alongsidefamilies.org/volunteer",don:"https://www.alongsidefamilies.org/give",cat:"Youth & Education",logo:""}, {name:"Angels & Sparrows",mission:"Providing food, essential supplies, and community support to families in need across Lake Norman - serving thousands of neighbors every year from {name:"Bags of Hope LKN",mission:"Weekend food bags for children facing food insecurity - serving up to 576 children weekly so no LKN student goes hungry over the {name:"Go Jen Go Foundation",mission:"Critical financial assistance to breast cancer patients in the Greater Charlotte area - housing, utilities, transportation, and groceries so patients can focus on {name:"Parker Smith Memorial Fund",mission:"Honoring a life of impact - supporting youth, education, and community initiatives in Lake Norman by keeping a legacy of service and purpose alive.",web:"https://www.linklakenorman.com",vol:"mailto:info@linklakenorman.com?subject=Parker Smith Memorial Fund Volunteer",don:"https://www.gofundme.com/f/parker-smith-memorial-fund",cat:"Youth & Education",logo:""}, {name:"Rural Hill Farm",mission:"Preserving LKN heritage - stewarding one of Mecklenburg County's largest working farms as a living classroom where everyone wins. {name:"Seasons of Giving LKN",mission:"Supporting independent seniors in need in Huntersville - meals twice a week, activities, basic needs, and meaningful relationships so no senior faces hardship ]; // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // OPPS ARRAY - COMMUNITY BOARD OPPORTUNITIES // To ADD: copy one entry, change id (increment), fill details // Fields: id, title, org (must match NPS name exactly), // type ("volunteer"/"event"/"training"/"urgent"), // freq ("weekly"/"monthly"/"onetime"), desc, slots, location // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const OPPS = [ {id:1,title:"Weekly Food Pantry Volunteers",org:"Angels & Sparrows",type:"volunteer",freq:"weekly",desc:"Help sort and distribute food to families every Tuesday and Thursday in Huntersville. No experience needed.",slots:8,location:"Huntersville, NC"}, {id:2,title:"Weekend Food Bag Packing",org:"Bags of Hope LKN",type:"volunteer",freq:"monthly",desc:"Pack weekend food bags for 576 children in LKN schools facing food insecurity. Family-friendly, great for service hours.",slots:20,location:"Cornelius, NC"}, {id:3,title:"URGENT: Furniture Delivery Volunteers",org:"Deliver with Purpose",type:"urgent",freq:"onetime",desc:"Immediate need for volunteers with trucks to deliver donated furniture to families in transitional housing.",slots:4,location:"Huntersville area"}, {id:4,title:"Free Health Clinic Support",org:"Cook Community Clinic",type:"volunteer",freq:"weekly",desc:"Administrative support, patient intake, translation (Spanish speakers especially needed) for uninsured adults in LKN.",slots:5,location:"Huntersville, NC"}, {id:5,title:"Youth Tutoring - Huntington Green",org:"Caterpillar Ministries",type:"volunteer",freq:"weekly",desc:"Tutor K-8 students in reading and math. 1-2 hours per week. Bilingual volunteers highly needed.",slots:10,location:"Huntersville, NC"}, {id:6,title:"Senior Companion Meals",org:"Seasons of Giving LKN",type:"volunteer",freq:"weekly",desc:"Deliver meals and spend 30 minutes with an isolated senior in Huntersville twice a week.",slots:6,location:"Huntersville, NC"}, {id:15,title:"Weekly Activities - Bingo, Crafts & Games",org:"Seasons of Giving LKN",type:"volunteer",freq:"weekly",desc:"Join us weekly to lead or assist with fun activities for our independent seniors - bingo, crafts, card games, and creative projects. Bring energy and a caring heart. No experience needed, just show up and have fun with amazing people!",slots:99,location:"Huntersville, NC"}, {id:16,title:"Senior Support Services - Meals & Wellness Checks",org:"Seasons of Giving LKN",type:"volunteer",freq:"weekly",desc:"Help deliver hot meals, assist with light errands, and provide friendly wellness check-ins for independent seniors in Huntersville twice a week. Meaningful one-on-one time that makes a real difference.",slots:99,location:"Huntersville, NC"}, {id:7,title:"Brownicity Facilitator Training",org:"Brownicity",type:"training",freq:"onetime",desc:"Free training to become a community facilitator for conversations on race, equity, and belonging.",slots:15,location:"Mooresville, NC"}, {id:9,title:"Little Smiles Hospital Visit",org:"Little Smiles NC",type:"volunteer",freq:"monthly",desc:"Bring joy to children in pediatric units at area hospitals. Bring gifts, games, and smiles to kids facing illness.",slots:12,location:"Charlotte region"}, {id:10,title:"Run Jen Run 5K Race Crew",org:"Go Jen Go Foundation",type:"event",freq:"onetime",desc:"Volunteer for the annual Run Jen Run 5K - check-in, water stations, finish line support. Great community event.",slots:30,location:"Davidson, NC"}, {id:11,title:"Habitat North Meck Build Day",org:"Habitat for Humanity (Charlotte Region)",type:"volunteer",freq:"monthly",desc:"Help build affordable homes in North Mecklenburg. No construction experience needed - training provided.",slots:20,location:"North Mecklenburg"}, {id:12,title:"Kids Work Internship Mentors",org:"Make An Impact Foundation",type:"volunteer",freq:"weekly",desc:"Mentor LKN high school students during paid summer internships. Share your professional experience.",slots:8,location:"Lake Norman area"}, {id:14,title:"Rural Hill Heritage Events",org:"Rural Hill Farm",type:"event",freq:"monthly",desc:"Help at monthly community events at Historic Rural Hill - one of Mecklenburg County's largest working farms.",slots:25,location:"Huntersville, NC"}, ]; // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // EVENTS - monthly event listings shown in scrolling Events tab // To ADD: {date:"Month Year", title:"Event Name", org:"Org Name"} // To REMOVE: delete the line // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const EVENTS_DATA = [ {date:"April 23, 2026",title:"LINK LKN Quarterly Nonprofit Connection",org:"The Serve Pickleball + Kitchen · Cornelius"}, {date:"April 23, 2026",title:"LINK LKN Quarterly Nonprofit Connection",org:"The Serve Pickleball + Kitchen · Cornelius"}, {date:"April 2026",title:"Angels & Sparrows Food Drive",org:"Angels & Sparrows · Huntersville"}, {date:"April 2026",title:"Cook Clinic Free Health Screening",org:"Cook Community Clinic · Huntersville"}, {date:"April 2026",title:"Caterpillar Ministries Spring Day",org:"Caterpillar Ministries · Huntersville"}, {date:"April 2026",title:"Brownicity Cultural Workshop",org:"Brownicity · Mooresville"}, {date:"April 2026",title:"Run Jen Run 5K",org:"Go Jen Go Foundation · Davidson"}, {date:"May 2026",title:"Bags of Hope Backpack Packing",org:"Bags of Hope LKN · Cornelius"}, {date:"May 2026",title:"Senior Lunch & Activities",org:"Seasons of Giving LKN · Huntersville"}, {date:"May 2026",title:"Habitat North Meck Build Day",org:"Habitat for Humanity · North Mecklenburg"}, ]; const LB = [ {rank:1,name:"Sarah M.",hrs:42,pts:840,badge:"Super Hero",school:"Lake Norman High"}, {rank:2,name:"James T.",hrs:38,pts:760,badge:"Impact Leader",school:"Davidson College"}, {rank:3,name:"Maya R.",hrs:31,pts:620,badge:"Community Star",school:"Hopewell High"}, {rank:4,name:"Chris B.",hrs:27,pts:540,badge:"Rising Star",school:"Mooresville High"}, {rank:5,name:"Alana W.",hrs:24,pts:480,badge:"Helper",school:"North Iredell"}, ]; let sheetURL=localStorage.getItem('linkSheetURL')||'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwG1py7iuuWUJ_ckOfJsj4w4rm_xnj0Vd7C1HgzoxzMz5VGtfZsZkkxvqccoF_S2WxCiw/exec',portalData=null; const logoCache={}; function getInit(n){ if(!n||typeof n!=='string')return'NP'; return n.split(' ').filter(w=>w&&w.length>2).slice(0,2).map(w=>w[0]).join('')||n[0]||'NP'; } function filterCat(cat){ document.getElementById('np-cat').value=cat; sw('directory'); loadEventBlock(); startSponsorMarquee(); renderNPs(); // Small delay to let panels switch then scroll to grid setTimeout(()=>{ const grid=document.getElementById('np-grid'); if(grid){const y=grid.getBoundingClientRect().top+window.scrollY-80;window.scrollTo({top:y,behavior:'smooth'});} },100); } function checkAdminPW(){ var input=document.getElementById('admin-pw-input'); var err=document.getElementById('admin-pw-error'); var gate=document.getElementById('admin-gate'); var content=document.getElementById('admin-content'); if(!input)return; if(input.value.trim()==='LINKLKNADMIN2026'){ if(gate)gate.style.display='none'; if(content)content.style.display='block'; renderAdmin();sessionStorage.setItem('adminUnlocked','1'); } else {if(err)err.textContent='Incorrect password.';input.value='';input.focus();} } function swNP(){sw('nonprofits');} function sw(t){ if((t==='demos'||t==='monetize')&&!sessionStorage.getItem('sogAdmin')&&!sessionStorage.getItem('linkAdmin')){ alert('This section is for LINK admin only. Please log in via the Admin tab.'); t='portal'; } document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('active')); document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('active')); const tab=document.getElementById('tab-'+t); const panel=document.getElementById('panel-'+t); if(tab)tab.classList.add('active'); if(panel)panel.classList.add('active'); const tabsBar=document.querySelector('.tabs-wrap'); if(tabsBar){ const y=tabsBar.getBoundingClientRect().top+window.scrollY-8; window.scrollTo({top:y,behavior:'smooth'}); } } function renderNPs(){ var countEl=document.getElementById('stat-orgs'); if(countEl)countEl.textContent=NPS.length; var q=((document.getElementById('np-search')||{value:''}).value||'').toLowerCase(); var cat=(document.getElementById('np-cat')||{value:''}).value; var f=NPS.filter(function(n){return n&&n.name&&(!q||n.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0||n.mission.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0||n.cat.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0)&&(!cat||n.cat===cat);}); (document.getElementById('np-count')||{}).textContent=f.length+' organization'+(f.length!==1?'s':''); var cards=''; f.forEach(function(n){ var logo=n.logo&&n.logo.indexOf('data:')===0?'' :'
'+getInit(n.name)+'
'; var logoArea=n.web&&n.web!=='#'?''+logo+'' :'
'+logo+'
'; var volBtn=n.vol&&n.vol!=='#'?'🤝 Volunteer' :'Volunteer'; var donBtn=n.don&&n.don!=='#'?'❤ Donate' :'Donate'; var webDisp=n.web&&n.web!=='#'?n.web.replace('https://','').replace('http://','').split('/')[0]:'Coming soon'; var footer=n.web&&n.web!=='#'?''+webDisp+'' :''+webDisp+''; cards+='
'+logoArea+'
'+n.cat+'
'+n.name+'
'+n.mission+'
'+volBtn+donBtn+'
'+footer+'
'; }); cards+='
+
Add your nonprofit
Get a profile, logo listing, volunteer matching, and auto-built member portal.
'; (document.getElementById('np-grid')||{}).innerHTML=cards; } function buildMQ(){ const lbl='OUR MEMBERS →'; const tiles=NPS.filter(n=>n&&n.name).map(n=>{ const logoHtml=n.logo&&n.logo.startsWith('data:')?``:`${n.name.substring(0,22)}`; return `
${logoHtml}
`; }).join(''); document.getElementById('mq').innerHTML=lbl+tiles+lbl+tiles; } function renderBoard(){ const type=document.getElementById('opp-type').value; const freq=document.getElementById('opp-freq').value; const f=OPPS.filter(o=>o&&(!type||o.type===type)&&(!freq||o.freq===freq)); document.getElementById('stat-opps').textContent=f.length; document.getElementById('board-grid').innerHTML=f.map(o=>{ const np=NPS.find(n=>n&&n.name===o.org)||{logo:'',name:o.org}; const logoHtml=np.logo&&np.logo.startsWith('data:')?``:`${getInit(o.org)}`; const typeClass=o.type==='urgent'?'urgent':o.type==='event'?'event':o.type==='training'?'training':''; const freqTag=o.freq==='weekly'?'Weekly':o.freq==='monthly'?'Monthly':'One-time'; const typeTag=o.type==='urgent'?'Urgent Need':o.type==='event'?'Event':o.type==='training'?'Training':'Volunteer'; return `
${logoHtml}
${o.org}
${o.title}
${o.desc}
${typeTag}${freqTag}${o.slots} slots${o.location}
`; }).join(''); } function signUpOpp(id){const o=OPPS.find(x=>x.id===id);if(o)alert('To sign up for "'+o.title+'" with '+o.org+':\n\n1. Register as a volunteer (Student or Adult tab)\n2. You will be matched with '+o.org+' and sent a personalized intro letter\n3. Or contact them directly via the Directory tab');} function learnOpp(id){const o=OPPS.find(x=>x.id===id);if(o){const np=NPS.find(n=>n&&n.name===o.org);if(np&&np.web&&np.web!=='#')window.open(np.web,'_blank');else alert('Contact '+o.org+' to learn more about "'+o.title+'".');}} function renderLB(){ document.getElementById('lb-body').innerHTML=LB.map((r,i)=>{ const c=i===0?'rk-g':i===1?'rk-s':i===2?'rk-b':'rk-d'; return `${['1st','2nd','3rd','4th','5th'][i]}${r.name}${r.hrs} hrs${r.pts.toLocaleString()} pts${r.badge}${r.school}`; }).join('')+``; } function renderEvents(){ document.getElementById('ev-scroll').innerHTML=EVENTS_DATA.map(e=>`
${e.date}
${e.title}
${e.org}
`).join('')+`
Ongoing
Post Your Event
Member portal →
`; document.querySelectorAll('#log-org,#ev-org,#ik-org').forEach(s=>{s.innerHTML=''+NPS.filter(n=>n&&n.name).map(n=>``).join('');}); } function renderAdmin(){ document.getElementById('admin-body').innerHTML=NPS.filter(n=>n&&n.name).map((n,i)=>` ${n.logo&&n.logo.startsWith('data:')?``:`
${getInit(n.name)}
`} ${n.name} ${n.cat} ${n.web&&n.web!=='#'?`${(n.web||'').replace('https://','').replace('http://','').split('/')[0]}`:' - '} `).join(''); const amts=[10,25,50,100,250]; const el=document.getElementById('don-amts-out'); if(el)el.innerHTML=amts.map(a=>``).join(''); } function selAmt(b,v){document.querySelectorAll('#don-amts-out button').forEach(x=>{x.style.background='#fff';x.style.color='';});b.style.background='var(--blue)';b.style.color='#fff';} function uploadLogoForOrg(idx){ if(!NPS[idx])return; const input=document.createElement('input');input.type='file';input.accept='image/*'; input.onchange=function(){ if(!this.files||!this.files[0])return; const url=URL.createObjectURL(this.files[0]); NPS[idx].logo=url;logoCache[NPS[idx].name]=url; renderNPs();renderAdmin(); // ── SPONSOR MARQUEE (JS-driven, guaranteed to scroll) ───────────────────── function startSponsorMarquee(){ var wrap = document.querySelector('.sp-marquee-wrap'); var track = document.querySelector('.sp-track'); if(!wrap || !track) return; var speed = 0.6; // px per frame var pos = 0; var halfW = track.scrollWidth / 2; function step(){ pos -= speed; if(Math.abs(pos) >= halfW) pos = 0; track.style.transform = 'translateX(' + pos + 'px)'; requestAnimationFrame(step); } // Wait for images to load var imgs = track.querySelectorAll('img'); var loaded = 0; if(imgs.length === 0){ step(); return; } imgs.forEach(function(img){ if(img.complete){ loaded++; if(loaded===imgs.length) step(); } else { img.onload = function(){ loaded++; if(loaded===imgs.length) step(); }; } }); // Fallback start after 500ms regardless setTimeout(step, 500); } buildMQ(); alert('Logo updated for '+NPS[idx].name+'! Upload this file to your /logos/ folder in GitHub to make it permanent.'); };input.click(); } function editNP(i){ if(!NPS[i])return; const n=NPS[i]; const name=prompt('Organization name:',n.name);if(!name)return; const mission=prompt('Mission statement:',n.mission);if(!mission)return; const web=prompt('Website:',n.web); const vol=prompt('Volunteer URL:',n.vol); const don=prompt('Donate URL:',n.don); NPS[i]={...n,name,mission,web:web||n.web,vol:vol||n.vol,don:don||n.don}; renderNPs();renderAdmin();buildMQ();renderBoard(); } function openPortal(idx){ if(!NPS[idx])return; const n=NPS[idx]; portalData={...n,idx,matched:Math.floor(Math.random()*15)+2,hours:Math.floor(Math.random()*80)+20,events:Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1}; sw('portal'); document.getElementById('portal-login-screen').style.display='none'; renderPortal(); } // ── NP MEMBER GATE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function isNPMember(){ return !!(sessionStorage.getItem('npMember')||sessionStorage.getItem('linkAdmin')); } function unlockInkind(){ var gate=document.getElementById('inkind-member-gate'); if(gate)gate.style.display='none'; document.querySelectorAll('.claim-locked').forEach(function(btn){btn.classList.remove('claim-locked');}); renderInkindGrid(); } // ── IN-KIND ITEMS DATA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Admin adds items here: {id, type, title, desc, donor, donorEmail, donorBiz, // value, qty, claimed:false, claimedBy:'', claimedDate:''} var INKIND_ITEMS = [ {id:'ik001',type:'inkind',title:'Office Furniture — 6 Desks, 12 Chairs', desc:'Gently used office furniture donated by a Huntersville business. Great for new or growing nonprofits.', donor:'James R.',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'Huntersville Business Partners', value:'$800',qty:1,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'ik002',type:'inkind',title:'Commercial Kitchen Time — 8 Hours', desc:'Certified commercial kitchen available for meal prep, baking fundraisers, or catering events.', donor:'Chef Maria',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LKN Culinary Arts', value:'$320',qty:1,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'ik003',type:'inkind',title:'Professional Photography — Half Day', desc:'Event photography for galas, volunteer days, or annual reports. Professional editing included.', donor:'Sarah L.',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'SL Photography', value:'$400',qty:1,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'ik004',type:'inkind',title:'Climate-Controlled Storage Space — 3 Months', desc:'10x10 unit perfect for storing event supplies, furniture, or donated goods.', donor:'Mike T.',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LKN Storage Solutions', value:'$450',qty:1,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'ik005',type:'auction',title:'Lake Norman Dinner for 4 — Value $250', desc:'Gift certificate to a local lakefront restaurant. Perfect for gala or benefit dinner auction.', donor:'Restaurant Owner',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'The Waterfront LKN', value:'$250',qty:1,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'ik006',type:'auction',title:'Weekend Pontoon Boat Rental', desc:'Full weekend pontoon rental on Lake Norman. Perfect auction item or raffle prize for summer events.', donor:'Captain Dave',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LKN Boat Rentals', value:'$600',qty:1,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'ik007',type:'inkind',title:'Home Services Package — 4 Hours', desc:'Painting, minor repairs, or yard cleanup. Great for senior services or transitional housing nonprofits.', donor:'Tom H.',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LKN Home Services', value:'$280',qty:1,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'ik008',type:'sponsor',title:'Corporate Event Sponsorship — Up to $500', desc:'A local business is offering event sponsorship. Logo on event materials, social recognition, and MC mention.', donor:'Business Manager',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LKN Corporate Partners', value:'$500',qty:3,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'sp001',type:'sponsor',title:'Presenting Sponsor — LINK Quarterly Giveback Event', desc:'Premier event sponsorship. Logo on all materials, 5-minute speaking slot, social recognition before/during/after event, LINK Community Partner sticker, and newsletter feature.', donor:'Contact LINK',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LINK LKN Events', value:'$2,500',qty:1,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:'', tiers:[{name:'Presenting',value:'$2,500',perks:'Logo on all materials · Speaking slot · Social feature · Community Partner sticker'}, {name:'Gold',value:'$1,500',perks:'Logo on materials · Social recognition · Community Partner sticker'}, {name:'Silver',value:'$750',perks:'Name on materials · Social mention · Community Partner sticker'}, {name:'Community',value:'$250',perks:'Social shoutout · Community Partner sticker'}]}, {id:'sp002',type:'sponsor',title:'Student Scholarship Fund Sponsor', desc:'Help fund the $500 quarterly student volunteer scholarship. Sponsors are recognized at the award ceremony, across social media, and in the LINK newsletter. Tax-deductible.', donor:'Contact LINK',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LINK LKN Scholarship', value:'$500+',qty:10,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'sp003',type:'sponsor',title:'Nonprofit of the Month Sponsor', desc:'Sponsor one nonprofit\'s featured spotlight for a full month — their story, mission, and volunteer needs promoted across all LINK platforms with your business as the presenting sponsor.', donor:'Contact LINK',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LINK LKN Spotlights', value:'$300/mo',qty:12,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'sp004',type:'sponsor',title:'Leaderboard Top Volunteer Sponsor', desc:'Sponsor the monthly top volunteer recognition. Your logo appears next to the #1 leaderboard position. Winner announcement across social media, newsletter, and LINK hub — with your name attached.', donor:'Contact LINK',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LINK LKN Leaderboard', value:'$150/mo',qty:12,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'sp005',type:'sponsor',title:'Community Event Table Sponsor', desc:'Branded table at LINK quarterly giveback events. Includes tablecloth, pull-up banner space, materials display, and 2 complimentary event seats. Great for local businesses wanting face time with the community.', donor:'Contact LINK',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LINK LKN Events', value:'$400',qty:6,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, {id:'sp006',type:'sponsor',title:'Annual Hub Banner Sponsor', desc:'Your business banner displayed on the LINK LKN community hub homepage for a full year — seen by every volunteer, nonprofit, school, and business that visits the platform.', donor:'Contact LINK',donorEmail:'info@linklakenorman.com',donorBiz:'LINK LKN Hub', value:'$600/yr',qty:3,claimed:false,claimedBy:'',claimedDate:''}, ]; // Track claims this year: {bizId: [npEmail, ...]} function getClaimsThisYear(){ var key='inkindClaims_'+new Date().getFullYear(); return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key)||'{}'); } function recordClaim(itemId, bizId, npEmail){ var key='inkindClaims_'+new Date().getFullYear(); var claims=getClaimsThisYear(); if(!claims[bizId])claims[bizId]=[]; claims[bizId].push({np:npEmail,item:itemId,date:new Date().toLocaleDateString()}); localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(claims)); } function hasNPClaimedFromBiz(bizId, npEmail){ var claims=getClaimsThisYear(); if(!claims[bizId])return false; return claims[bizId].some(function(c){return c.np===npEmail;}); } // ── CLAIM ITEM FLOW ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // ── RENDER INKIND GRID FROM DATA ─────────────────────────────────────────── function renderInkindGrid(){ var grid=document.getElementById('inkind-grid'); if(!grid)return; var npEmail=sessionStorage.getItem('npMember')||''; var typeLabels={inkind:'✅ Available',auction:'🏆 Auction Item',sponsor:'🤝 Sponsorship'}; var html=''; INKIND_ITEMS.forEach(function(item){ var claimed=item.claimed; var alreadyClaimed=npEmail&&hasNPClaimedFromBiz(item.donorBiz,npEmail); var tag=claimed?'Claimed':(''+(typeLabels[item.type]||'Available')+''); html+='
'; html+=tag; html+='

'+item.title+'

'; html+='

'+item.desc+'

'; html+='
💼 Donated by: '+item.donorBiz+'  ·  Est. Value: '+item.value+'
'; if(claimed){ html+=''; } else if(alreadyClaimed){ html+=''; } else { html+=''; } html+='
'; }); grid.innerHTML=html; // Render sponsor opportunities in separate grid renderSponsorGrid(); } function renderSponsorGrid(){ var grid=document.getElementById('sponsor-grid'); if(!grid)return; var npEmail=sessionStorage.getItem('npMember')||''; var sponsors=INKIND_ITEMS.filter(function(i){return i.type==='sponsor';}); var html=''; sponsors.forEach(function(item){ var alreadyClaimed=npEmail&&hasNPClaimedFromBiz(item.donorBiz,npEmail); html+='
'; html+='🤝 Sponsorship'; html+='

'+item.title+'

'; html+='

'+item.desc+'

'; html+='
💰 Investment: '+item.value+''; if(item.qty>1)html+='  ·  '+item.qty+' spots available'; html+='
'; if(item.tiers){ html+='
'; item.tiers.forEach(function(t){ html+='
'; html+='
'+t.name+' — '+t.value+'
'; html+='
'+t.perks+'
'; }); html+='
'; } if(isNPMember()){ html+=''; } else { html+=''; } html+='
'; }); grid.innerHTML=html; } function registerNPPassword(email, pwd){ // Called when NP completes registration and payment var npPWs=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('linkNPPasswords')||'{}'); npPWs[email.toLowerCase()]=pwd; localStorage.setItem('linkNPPasswords',JSON.stringify(npPWs)); } function portalLogin(){ const email=document.getElementById('pl-email').value.trim().toLowerCase(); const pwd=document.getElementById('pl-pwd').value; if(!email||!pwd){document.getElementById('pl-result').innerHTML='
Please enter email and password.
';return;} // Check against registered NP passwords in localStorage (set when NP registers) const npPWs=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('linkNPPasswords')||'{}'); const adminPW='LINKLKNADMIN2026'; const isAdmin=(pwd===adminPW)||sessionStorage.getItem('linkAdmin'); const isNP=npPWs[email]&&npPWs[email]===pwd; if(!isAdmin&&!isNP){ document.getElementById('pl-result').innerHTML='
Invalid email or password. Apply to become a member nonprofit
'; return; } if(isNP){sessionStorage.setItem('npMember',email);} if(isAdmin){sessionStorage.setItem('linkAdmin','1');} const idx=Math.floor(Math.random()*NPS.length); portalData={...NPS[idx],idx,email,matched:Math.floor(Math.random()*15)+2,hours:Math.floor(Math.random()*80)+20,events:Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1}; document.getElementById('portal-login-screen').style.display='none'; renderPortal(); unlockInkind(); } function renderPortal(){ if(!portalData)return; const n=portalData; const logoHtml=n.logo&&n.logo.startsWith('data:')?`
`:`
${getInit(n.name)}
`; const myOpps=OPPS.filter(o=>o&&o.org===n.name); document.getElementById('portal-main-screen').innerHTML=`
${logoHtml}

${n.name}

${n.mission}

${n.matched}
Volunteers matched
${n.hours}
Hours logged
${myOpps.length}
Open opportunities
${n.events}
Events posted

Post a Volunteer Opportunity

`; document.getElementById('portal-main-screen').style.display='block'; } function postOpp(orgName){ const title=document.getElementById('portal-opp-title').value.trim(); const desc=document.getElementById('portal-opp-desc').value.trim(); const type=document.getElementById('portal-opp-type').value; const freq=document.getElementById('portal-opp-freq').value; const loc=document.getElementById('portal-opp-loc').value.trim()||'Lake Norman area'; const slots=parseInt(document.getElementById('portal-opp-slots').value)||10; if(!title||!desc){document.getElementById('portal-opp-result').innerHTML='
Please fill in title and description.
';return;} OPPS.push({id:OPPS.length+1,title,org:orgName,type,freq,desc,slots,location:loc}); sendSheet({type:'opportunity',title,org:orgName,oppType:type,freq,desc,location:loc,slots,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); document.getElementById('portal-opp-result').innerHTML='
Opportunity posted to the Community Board!
'; renderBoard(); } function claimItem(item){alert('To claim "'+item+'":\n\nContact LINK Lake Norman at info@linklakenorman.com with your nonprofit name and this item name. We will connect you with the donor directly.');} function openDonateItem(){alert('To donate an item or service for LKN nonprofit events:\n\nEmail info@linklakenorman.com with:\n- Item/service description\n- Estimated value\n- Your business name\n\nWe will list it on the community board and connect you with interested nonprofits.');} function postNeed(){ const org=document.getElementById('ik-org').value; const item=document.getElementById('ik-item').value.trim(); if(!org||!item){document.getElementById('ik-result').innerHTML='
Please fill in organization and item needed.
';return;} sendSheet({type:'inkind_need',org,item,qty:document.getElementById('ik-qty').value,urgency:document.getElementById('ik-urgency').value,desc:document.getElementById('ik-desc').value,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); document.getElementById('ik-result').innerHTML='
Need posted! LINK Lake Norman will work to match you with donors and business partners.
'; } function openTier(tier,price){ var payLinks={ 'Community Friend':'https://linklakenorman.com/pay-link/4df9a89a-bac3-4129-8ac7-c265b0fb6ec0', 'Community Champion':'https://linklakenorman.com/pay-link/a2862cec-8c12-4d59-8a25-ee419b2e26e3', 'Presenting Sponsor':'https://linklakenorman.com/pay-link/a8d7c11f-f7a8-4d36-b45a-8ff13b89dd9c', 'Nonprofit Membership':'https://linklakenorman.com/pay-link/43957f28-7e9e-40c7-80f9-30cf22319168', 'Custom':'https://linklakenorman.com/pay-link/a6eb85aa-7256-45cb-a78f-853706509bd6' }; var payLink=payLinks[tier]||payLinks['Custom']; window.open(payLink,'_blank'); } function updatePortalPreview(){ const name=document.getElementById('n-name').value.trim(); const mission=document.getElementById('n-mission').value.trim(); const preview=document.getElementById('portal-preview-box'); if(name||mission)preview.style.display='block'; document.getElementById('prev-name').textContent=name||'Your Organization Name'; document.getElementById('prev-mission').textContent=mission||'Your mission statement will appear here...'; const lb=document.getElementById('prev-logo-box'); const logoUrl=logoCache[name]; if(logoUrl){lb.className='portal-logo-box';lb.innerHTML=``;} else{lb.className='portal-init-lg';lb.textContent=name?getInit(name):'NP';} } function previewLogo(input){ if(!input.files||!input.files[0])return; const url=URL.createObjectURL(input.files[0]); const img=document.getElementById('logo-preview-img'); img.src=url;img.style.display='block'; const name=document.getElementById('n-name').value.trim(); if(name)logoCache[name]=url; updatePortalPreview(); } function sendSheet(data){ if(!sheetURL)return; if(!data.formName&&!data.form_id)data.formName='GeneralSubmissions'; data.form_id=data.form_id||data.formName; data.Timestamp=new Date().toLocaleString(); var iid='_gs_'+Date.now(); var ifr=document.createElement('iframe'); ifr.name=iid;ifr.style.display='none'; document.body.appendChild(ifr); var frm=document.createElement('form'); frm.method='POST';frm.action=sheetURL;frm.target=iid;frm.style.display='none'; Object.keys(data).forEach(function(k){ var inp=document.createElement('input'); inp.type='hidden';inp.name=k;inp.value=data[k]||''; frm.appendChild(inp); }); document.body.appendChild(frm); frm.submit(); setTimeout // ── STUDENT REGISTRATION ───────────────────────────────────────────────── function regStudent(){ var first=document.getElementById('s-first').value.trim(); var last=document.getElementById('s-last').value.trim(); var email=document.getElementById('s-email').value.trim(); var school=document.getElementById('s-school').value.trim(); var interests=Array.from((document.getElementById('s-interests')||{selectedOptions:[]}).selectedOptions).map(o=>o.value); var res=document.getElementById('s-result'); if(!first||!last||!email){if(res)res.innerHTML='
Please fill in all required fields.
';return;} sendSheet({formName:'Volunteers_Students',type:'student', First:first,Last:last,Email:email, Phone:(document.getElementById('s-phone')||{value:''}).value.trim(), School:school,DOB:(document.getElementById('s-dob')||{value:''}).value, Interests:interests.join(', '), Transport:(document.getElementById('s-transport')||{value:''}).value, BGCheck:(document.getElementById('s-bgcheck')||{value:''}).value, Status:'Pending'}); if(res)res.innerHTML='
You are registered!
Welcome '+first+'! Your student volunteer profile has been created. Jaime will reach out within 48 hours with next steps.

Start earning points and climbing the leaderboard! 🌱
'; ['s-first','s-last','s-email','s-phone','s-school'].forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); } // ── CONTACT FORM ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function regContact(){ var name=(document.getElementById('contact-name')||{value:''}).value.trim(); var email=(document.getElementById('contact-email')||{value:''}).value.trim(); var subject=(document.getElementById('contact-subject')||{value:''}).value.trim(); var msg=(document.getElementById('contact-message')||{value:''}).value.trim(); var res=document.getElementById('contact-result'); if(!name||!email||!msg){if(res)res.innerHTML='
Please fill in all required fields.
';return;} sendSheet({formName:'GeneralSubmissions',type:'contact',Name:name,Email:email,Subject:subject,Message:msg}); if(res)res.innerHTML='

Thank you '+name+'! We will reply within 24 hours.

';return;} sendSheet({formName:'QuarterlyCollaboration',Name:name,Organization:org,Email:email, Phone:(document.getElementById('q-phone')||{value:''}).value.trim(), Type:type, Goals:(document.getElementById('q-goals')||{value:''}).value.trim(), Status:'Registered'}); if(res)res.innerHTML='
You are registered!
Thank you '+name+' from '+org+'! You will receive confirmation and event details at '+email+'. See you at the roundtable!
'; ['q-name','q-org','q-email','q-phone','q-goals'].forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); } (function(){if(ifr.parentNode)ifr.parentNode.removeChild(ifr);if(frm.parentNode)frm.parentNode.removeChild(frm);},5000); } async function regAdult(){ const first=document.getElementById('a-first').value.trim(); const last=document.getElementById('a-last').value.trim(); const email=document.getElementById('a-email').value.trim(); const skills=document.getElementById('a-skills').value.trim(); const interests=Array.from(document.getElementById('a-interests').selectedOptions).map(o=>o.value); if(!first||!last||!email){document.getElementById('a-result').innerHTML='
Please fill in all required fields.

You are registered! Your data was saved successfully.
'; sendSheet({formName:'Volunteers_Adults',type:'adult',first,last,email,skills,interests:interests.join(', '),timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); const matched=NPS.filter(n=>n&&interests.some(i=>n.cat&&n.cat.toLowerCase().includes(i.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0]))).slice(0,3); const orgList=matched.length?matched.map(o=>o.name).join(', '):NPS.filter(n=>n&&n.name).slice(0,3).map(o=>o.name).join(', '); const iStr=interests.length?interests.join(', '):'general community service'; } async function regNP(){ const name=document.getElementById('n-name').value.trim(); const email=document.getElementById('n-email').value.trim(); const mission=document.getElementById('n-mission').value.trim(); const web=document.getElementById('n-web').value.trim(); const vol=document.getElementById('n-vol').value.trim(); const don=document.getElementById('n-don').value.trim(); const cat=document.getElementById('n-cat').value; if(!name||!email||!mission){document.getElementById('n-result').innerHTML='
Please fill in all required fields.
';return;} const logoFile=document.getElementById('n-logo-file'); const logoUrl=logoFile.files&&logoFile.files[0]?URL.createObjectURL(logoFile.files[0]):''; NPS.push({name,mission,web:web||'#',vol:vol||'#',don:don||'#',cat:cat||'Youth & Education',logo:logoUrl}); if(logoUrl)logoCache[name]=logoUrl; renderNPs();renderAdmin();buildMQ(); sendSheet({type:'nonprofit',name,email,mission,web,vol,don,cat,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); document.getElementById('n-result').innerHTML='
Application received! Your organization has been added to the directory preview. Once your $200 payment is confirmed, your full member portal will be activated.
'; } async function regBiz(){ const name=document.getElementById('b-name').value.trim(); const email=document.getElementById('b-email').value.trim(); const vision=document.getElementById('b-vision').value.trim(); if(!name||!email){document.getElementById('b-result').innerHTML='
Please fill in required fields.
';return;} document.getElementById('b-result').innerHTML='
Thank you! Your information was saved. A team member will follow up soon.
'; sendSheet({formName:'GeneralSubmissions',type:'business',name,email,vision,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); } function getImpact(){ var topic=document.getElementById('impact-topic').value; if(!topic){document.getElementById('impact-result').innerHTML='
Please select a topic.
';return;} document.getElementById('impact-result').innerHTML='
Redirecting to Community Data...
'; sw('data'); } function logHrs(){ const email=document.getElementById('log-email').value.trim(); const hrs=parseFloat(document.getElementById('log-hrs').value)||0; const org=document.getElementById('log-org').value; if(!email||!hrs||!org){document.getElementById('log-result').innerHTML='
Please fill in all fields.
';return;} sendSheet({type:'hours',email,hrs,org,date:document.getElementById('log-date').value,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); const pts=Math.round(hrs*20); document.getElementById('log-result').innerHTML=`
Hours logged! +${pts} points earned for ${hrs} hour${hrs!==1?'s':''} at ${org}. Keep going!
`; } function postEv(){ const title=document.getElementById('ev-title').value.trim(); const org=document.getElementById('ev-org').value; const date=document.getElementById('ev-date').value; if(!title||!org||!date){document.getElementById('ev-result').innerHTML='
Please fill in all required fields.
';return;} const formatted=new Date(date+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'long',year:'numeric'}); EVENTS_DATA.unshift({date:formatted,title,org}); renderEvents(); sendSheet({type:'event',title,org,date,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); document.getElementById('ev-result').innerHTML=`
Event posted! "${title}" by ${org} now appears in the monthly events banner.
`; } function saveSheet(){ sheetURL=document.getElementById('sheet-url').value.trim(); document.getElementById('sheet-result').innerHTML=sheetURL?'
Webhook saved. All form submissions will auto-sync to your Google Sheet.
':'
Please enter a valid URL.
'; } // ── GROUP REGISTRATION ────────────────────────────────────────────── function regGroup(){ const name=document.getElementById('grp-name').value.trim(); const email=document.getElementById('grp-email').value.trim(); const leader=document.getElementById('grp-leader').value.trim(); const pwd=document.getElementById('grp-pwd').value; const type=document.getElementById('grp-type').value; const size=document.getElementById('grp-size').value; const goal=document.getElementById('grp-goal').value; const mission=document.getElementById('grp-mission').value.trim(); if(!name||!email||!leader||!pwd){document.getElementById('grp-result').innerHTML='
Please fill in all required fields.
';return;} sendSheet({formName:'Volunteers_Students',type:'group',name,leader,email,phone:document.getElementById('grp-phone').value.trim(),groupType:type,size,goal,mission,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); document.getElementById('grp-result').innerHTML=`
Group portal created for ${name}!

✅ Your group password: ${pwd} - share this with members so they can join your group when registering

A confirmation has been sent to ${email}. Questions? info@linklakenorman.com
`; } // ── ENHANCED PORTAL LOGIN (NP + GROUP + ADMIN) ────────────────────── function renderAdminPortal(){ document.getElementById('portal-main-screen').innerHTML=`

`; document.getElementById('portal-main-screen').style.display='block'; } function adminSendMsg(){ const msg=document.getElementById('admin-msg').value.trim(); if(!msg){document.getElementById('admin-action-result').innerHTML='
Please enter a message.
';return;} sendSheet({type:'admin_message',message:msg,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); document.getElementById('admin-action-result').innerHTML='
Message logged and sent to Google Sheet. Connect your email service to distribute to all members.
'; } function adminConfirm(){ const org=document.getElementById('admin-confirm-org').value; if(!org){document.getElementById('admin-action-result').innerHTML='
Please select an org.
';return;} sendSheet({type:'admin_confirm',org,status:'paid_active',timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); document.getElementById('admin-action-result').innerHTML=`
✅ ${org} marked as paid and active. Logged to Google Sheet.
`; } function adminNote(){ const org=document.getElementById('admin-note-org').value; const note=document.getElementById('admin-note-text').value.trim(); if(!org||!note){document.getElementById('admin-action-result').innerHTML='
Please select an org and enter a note.
';return;} sendSheet({type:'admin_note',org,note,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); document.getElementById('admin-action-result').innerHTML=`
📝 Note saved for ${org}. Logged to Google Sheet.
`; } function submitRSVP(){ const first=document.getElementById('rsvp-first').value.trim(); const last=document.getElementById('rsvp-last').value.trim(); const email=document.getElementById('rsvp-email').value.trim(); const org=document.getElementById('rsvp-org').value.trim(); const type=document.getElementById('rsvp-type').value; const goal=document.getElementById('rsvp-goal').value.trim(); if(!first||!last||!email){document.getElementById('rsvp-result').innerHTML='
Please fill in your name and email.
';return;} sendSheet({formName:'Events',type:'rsvp',first,last,email,phone:document.getElementById('rsvp-phone').value.trim(),org,attendanceType:type,goal,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}); document.getElementById('rsvp-result').innerHTML=`
RSVP received! You're on the list for the next Nonprofit & Community Quarterly Connection. Watch for a confirmation at ${email}. Questions? info@linklakenorman.com
`; } // ── BUSINESS IN-KIND / AUCTION / RAFFLE ITEM SYSTEM ───────────────── let bizItems = []; const typeLabels = {inkind:'In-Kind Donation',auction:'Auction Item',raffle:'Raffle Prize',sponsorship:'Cash Sponsorship',volunteer:'Employee Volunteer Hours'}; const typeColors = {inkind:'var(--blue)',auction:'#c2410c',raffle:'#7e22ce',sponsorship:'var(--green)',volunteer:'var(--navy)'}; function addBizItem(){ var biz=document.getElementById('di-biz').value.trim(); var email=document.getElementById('di-email').value.trim(); var title=document.getElementById('di-title').value.trim(); var type=document.getElementById('di-type').value; var value=document.getElementById('di-value').value.trim(); var qty=document.getElementById('di-qty').value; var limit=document.getElementById('di-limit').value; var expiry=document.getElementById('di-expiry').value; var npref=document.getElementById('di-npref').value.trim(); var desc=document.getElementById('di-desc').value.trim(); var msg=document.getElementById('di-msg'); var sponsorLevel=(document.getElementById('di-sponsor-level')||{value:''}).value; var sponsorAmount=(document.getElementById('di-sponsor-amount')||{value:''}).value.trim(); var sponsorEvents=(document.getElementById('di-sponsor-events')||{value:''}).value.trim(); var sponsorRecog=(document.getElementById('di-sponsor-recog')||{value:''}).value.trim(); if(!biz||!email||!title||!type||!qty||!desc){msg.innerHTML='Please fill in all required fields.';return;} // Build the new item and add to live INKIND_ITEMS array var newItem={ id:'biz_'+Date.now(), type:type, title:title, desc:desc+(sponsorEvents?'\nAvailable for: '+sponsorEvents:''), donor:biz, donorEmail:email, donorBiz:biz, value:sponsorAmount||value, qty:parseInt(qty)||1, claimed:false, claimedBy:'', claimedDate:'', sponsorLevel:sponsorLevel, sponsorRecog:sponsorRecog, npref:npref||'All member nonprofits', expiry:expiry||'Ongoing', limit:limit||'1' }; INKIND_ITEMS.push(newItem); // Submit to Google Sheet — triggers email to LINK admin for approval sendSheet({ formName:'InKind_Submissions', BusinessName:biz, ContactEmail:email, ItemTitle:title, ItemType:type, Value:sponsorAmount||value, Quantity:qty, Description:desc, SponsorLevel:sponsorLevel, SponsorAmount:sponsorAmount, SponsorEvents:sponsorEvents, SponsorRecognition:sponsorRecog, AvailableTo:npref||'All nonprofits', Expiry:expiry||'Ongoing', Status:'Pending Review' }); // Show Community Partner confirmation msg.innerHTML='
' +'
🏅 Thank you, '+biz+'!
' +'
' +'Your '+title+' has been submitted for review. LINK will post it to the board within 24 hours.

' +'🎉 You are now a LINK LKN Community Partner! You will receive your digital Community Partner sticker by email to display on your website, social media, and marketing materials.

' +'You can now post: Our donations, auction items & sponsorships are available on the LINK LKN Community Hub — your year\'s giving commitment is done in one place. Visit linklakenorman.com.' +'
'; ['di-title','di-type','di-value','di-qty','di-limit','di-expiry','di-npref','di-desc','di-sponsor-level','di-sponsor-amount','di-sponsor-events','di-sponsor-recog'].forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); document.getElementById('sponsor-fields').style.display='none'; bizItems.push(newItem); renderBizItems(); renderInkindGrid(); } function renderBizItems(){ function removeBizItem(i){bizItems.splice(i,1);renderBizItems();} function submitBizItems(){ if(!bizItems.length)return; const biz=bizItems[0].biz; bizItems.forEach(item=>{sendSheet({type:'biz_donation',bizName:item.biz,bizEmail:item.email,itemTitle:item.title,itemType:item.type,value:item.value,qty:item.qty,limitPerOrg:item.limit,expiry:item.expiry,npPreference:item.npref,description:item.desc,timestamp:new Date().toISOString()});}); const itemList=bizItems.map(item=>`• ${item.title} (${typeLabels[item.type]||item.type}) - Qty: ${item.qty}${item.value?' · Value: '+item.value:''}`).join('\n'); document.getElementById('biz-submit-result').innerHTML=`
✅ ${bizItems.length} item${bizItems.length>1?'s':''} submitted!

What happens next:
1️⃣ LINK Lake Norman reviews & approves your items within 24 hrs
2️⃣ Items are listed live on the In-Kind & Sponsors board
3️⃣ When a nonprofit claims an item, we send an automatic introduction email connecting you with the nonprofit
4️⃣ Inventory decrements automatically - when it hits 0 the item is removed

Questions? info@linklakenorman.com
`; bizItems=[];renderBizItems(); } buildMQ();renderNPs();renderLB();renderEvents();renderBoard();renderAdmin(); document.getElementById('biz-submit-result').innerHTML=`
✅ ${bizItems.length} item${bizItems.length>1?'s':''} submitted!

What happens next:
1️⃣ LINK Lake Norman reviews & approves your items within 24 hrs
2️⃣ Items are listed live on the In-Kind & Sponsors board
3️⃣ When a nonprofit claims an item, we send an automatic introduction email connecting you with the nonprofit
4️⃣ Inventory decrements automatically - when it hits 0 the item is removed

Questions? info@linklakenorman.com
`; bizItems=[];renderBizItems(); } const subject=encodeURIComponent('Claim Request: '+item); buildMQ();renderNPs();renderLB();renderEvents();renderBoard();renderAdmin(); // ── EVENT BLOCK EDITOR ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── var EVENT_DEFAULTS = { title: 'LINK Nonprofit Collaboration', date: 'Tuesday, June 2, 2026  ·  9:00 AM – 10:30 AM', location: 'The Serve Pickleball + Kitchen  ·  20220 Chartown Drive, Cornelius, NC 28031', desc: "We'll talk about shared challenges, overlapping missions, and the real value of building relationships that go beyond the networking table — connecting LINK member nonprofits for deeper collaboration and shared impact.", link: 'https://www.eventbrite.com/e/1988717088346?aff=oddtdtcreator' }; function loadEventBlock(){ var saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('linkEvent') || 'null'); var ev = saved || EVENT_DEFAULTS; var t=document.getElementById('ev-title'); var d=document.getElementById('ev-date'); var l=document.getElementById('ev-location'); var ds=document.getElementById('ev-desc'); var lk=document.getElementById('ev-link'); var blk=document.getElementById('event-block'); if(t)t.innerHTML=ev.title; if(d)d.innerHTML='📆 '+ev.date; if(l)l.innerHTML='📍 '+ev.location; if(ds)ds.innerHTML=ev.desc; if(lk)lk.href=ev.link; var hidden=localStorage.getItem('linkEventHidden'); if(blk)blk.style.display=hidden?'none':'flex'; } function initEventEditor(){ var saved=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('linkEvent')||'null')||EVENT_DEFAULTS; var fields=[['ev-edit-title','title'],['ev-edit-date','date'],['ev-edit-location','location'],['ev-edit-desc','desc'],['ev-edit-link','link']]; fields.forEach(function(f){ var el=document.getElementById(f[0]); if(el)el.value=saved[f[1]]||''; }); } function saveEventBlock(){ var ev={ title:(document.getElementById('ev-edit-title')||{value:''}).value||EVENT_DEFAULTS.title, date:(document.getElementById('ev-edit-date')||{value:''}).value||EVENT_DEFAULTS.date, location:(document.getElementById('ev-edit-location')||{value:''}).value||EVENT_DEFAULTS.location, desc:(document.getElementById('ev-edit-desc')||{value:''}).value||EVENT_DEFAULTS.desc, link:(document.getElementById('ev-edit-link')||{value:''}).value||EVENT_DEFAULTS.link }; localStorage.setItem('linkEvent',JSON.stringify(ev)); localStorage.removeItem('linkEventHidden'); loadEventBlock(); var s=document.getElementById('ev-save-status'); if(s){s.textContent='✓ Event updated!';setTimeout(function(){s.textContent='';},3000);} } function hideEventBlock(){ localStorage.setItem('linkEventHidden','1'); var blk=document.getElementById('event-block'); if(blk)blk.style.display='none'; var s=document.getElementById('ev-save-status'); if(s)s.textContent='Event block hidden from public.'; } function showEventBlock(){ localStorage.removeItem('linkEventHidden'); var blk=document.getElementById('event-block'); if(blk)blk.style.display='flex'; var s=document.getElementById('ev-save-status'); if(s)s.textContent='Event block is now visible.'; } (function init(){ var u=localStorage.getItem('linkSheetURL')||''; if(u)sheetURL=u; var adm=sessionStorage.getItem('linkAdmin')||''; if(adm)adminUnlocked=true; sw('directory'); renderInkindGrid(); if(isNPMember()){unlockInkind();} })();

🤝 Sponsorship Opportunities

Support LINK events, scholarships, and programs. All sponsors receive Community Partner status, digital sticker, and recognition across all LINK platforms. Member nonprofits only.

🎬 Live Demos — LINK Lake Norman Tools

Interactive previews of every tool and system built for the LINK Lake Norman ecosystem. Click any demo to explore it live.

🌐
LINK Community Hub
This page — the full all-in-one volunteer, nonprofit, student, and business platform for Lake Norman
16 tabs · NP directory · Leaderboard · Volunteer forms · Groups & Schools · Events · Admin portal
Explore Live Demo →
🍂
Seasons of Giving LKN Hub
The SOG volunteer & program hub — seniors, mentors, students, and community resources
9 tabs · Meal delivery · Thursday activities · Tuesday resources · Mentor/intern program · Print materials · Admin
View SOG Hub Demo →
📊
Google Sheet Integration
All forms auto-submit to Google Sheets via Apps Script — no backend required
Volunteer registrations · NP applications · Student signups · Business inquiries · Contact forms
View in Admin Panel →
🏆
Volunteer Leaderboard System
Live points tracking, badge tiers, school group rankings, and top volunteer recognition
20 pts/hour · Badges: Seedling → Rising → Champion → Legend · Monthly & quarterly awards
View Leaderboard Demo →
🏫
Groups & Schools Portal
Register a school, team, NHS chapter, or civic group — track collective hours & members
School groups · Sports teams · Clubs · Faith orgs · NHS chapters · Civic groups
View Groups Demo →
🤝
Quarterly Nonprofit Roundtable
Event registration, collaboration matching, shared resource board for NP partners
Registration form · Attendee types · Goals matching · Partner connections · Resource sharing
View Events Demo →
Want a Hub Like This for Your Community?
This entire platform was custom built for Lake Norman. Everything you see — the volunteer system, leaderboard, nonprofit directory, admin portal, and Google Sheet integration — can be built for your region or organization.
Contact Us About a Custom Build →

💰 Revenue Streams — LINK Lake Norman

Multiple ways to generate income through this platform while keeping the mission first. As a founder, you can personally earn through your LLC/consulting company separate from the 501(c)(3).

🧾 How You Personally Profit (Not Through the Nonprofit)

The nonprofit receives membership fees and donations. You profit through separate arrangements below.

🏗️ Platform Build Fees
Charge other nonprofits, schools, or community orgs to build a hub like this for them. $2,500–$8,000 per custom build through your LLC. You own the code.
Est. Income: $2,500–$8,000 per project
📋 Platform Licensing / SaaS
License the LINK hub model to other communities as a white-label product. Monthly fee for hosting, updates, and support. You keep the platform, they pay to use it.
Est. Income: $200–$500/month per community
🎓 Soft Skills Training Contracts
Businesses pay your LLC to deliver LINK's soft skills curriculum to their employees. You deliver, you get paid. The nonprofit gets credit and exposure.
Est. Income: $500–$2,500 per session
🤝 Consulting / Strategy
Nonprofits, schools, and businesses pay you as a consultant for community strategy, workforce development, and volunteer program design. Separate from LINK.
Est. Income: $75–$200/hour
🔗 Affiliate Revenue
Already in place on the Resources tab — Square, Amazon, Gumroad, Fireflies. These pay you personally regardless of the nonprofit. Low effort, recurring income.
Est. Income: $100–$800/month (builds over time)
📅 Event Production Fees
Charge a production/coordination fee for the quarterly roundtable and community events. LINK hosts it, your LLC invoices for event management. $500–$2,000 per event.
Est. Income: $500–$2,000 per event

🏛️ Nonprofit Revenue (Goes to LINK)

These fund the mission and pay for operations, including any salary you draw as a full-time staff member.

NP Membership $200/yr
Membership fees × $200 per NP per year. Grows as the network grows.
Featured NP Tier $500/yr
Banner placement on directory home + hero + first in category. 10 nonprofits = $5,000/yr.
Corporate Membership $500–$2,500/yr
Businesses sponsor a tier, get listed as community partners, employees' hours tracked on leaderboard.
Pinned Opportunities $50–$150/mo
NPs pay to pin a volunteer opportunity to the top of the board for a month. "Featured" badge shown.
Event Fees $25–$75/listing
NPs pay to feature an event at top of the monthly events board with a "Featured" badge.
Scholarship Donations
Anyone can donate to the $500 student scholarship fund. Build a reserve over time that's self-sustaining.
💡 Important: You Can Pay Yourself Through the Nonprofit
As the Executive Director / Founder of a 501(c)(3), you can and should draw a reasonable salary from the nonprofit. This is completely legal and normal. Once LINK generates $40,000–$60,000+ in annual revenue from memberships, grants, and corporate partnerships, you can pay yourself $30,000–$50,000/yr as a staff member — while the platform-building and consulting income through your LLC adds on top of that. Talk to a nonprofit attorney or accountant to structure this correctly.
